transparent-ai-apprentice.note: Local Agent-plugin MCP server for native host selection, teachable sessions, existing-tool demonstrations, public traces, and disabled rule drafts. It contains no model runtime and requires no separate model API or API key.

aicad-agent.note: Integrated deterministic 2D CAD and transactional SolidWorks 3D planning, validation, and artifact generation tools invoked by the host Agent in the reviewed AI Apprentice workflow.
